title: mentha procumbens var. segetalis
intro: Mentha procumbens var. segetalis, also known as wild mint or prostrate mint, is a perennial herb that belongs to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and is native to North America. The plant has been used for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Mentha procumbens var. segetalis include relief from digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin irritations, as well as its ability to reduce stress and anxiety. This plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
